name: Nam Phrik Kaeng Khiao Wan (Green Curry Paste) Ett
recipeInstructions:
1. In a wok over low heat, put the coriander seeds and cumin seeds.
2. Dry fry for about 5 minutes, then grind into a powder.
3. Into a blender, put the rest of the ingredients except the shrimp paste and blend to mix well.
4. Add the coriander-cumin seed mixture and the shrimp paste and blend to obtain half a cup of a fine-textured paste.
5. This can be stored in a glass jar in the refrigerator for about 3-4 months.
